shots.narrative: Hit driver 280 yards down the right side of the fairway, slight fade but playable
8-iron from 145 yards in the fairway, landed on the front edge of the green
Two-putt from 25 feet for a comfortable par
3-wood off the tee 230 yards, pulled slightly left into the first cut of rough
Pitching wedge from 95 yards in light rough, landed 12 feet from the pin
Missed the 12-foot birdie putt just left, tapped in for par
7-iron tee shot on par 3, pushed right into the greenside bunker
Bunker shot blasted out to 15 feet past the hole
Missed the par save, settled for bogey
Solid driver 265 yards down the middle of the fairway
6-iron from 175 yards, caught it thin and it ran through the green into the back fringe
Long putt from the fringe lagged to 3 feet, made the comebacker for par
Crushed driver 270 yards, slight draw staying in the fairway
5-iron from 190 yards, struck it well but pushed it 20 yards right of the green
Pitching wedge chip from 20 yards short of the green, checked up to 8 feet
Made the 8-foot par save, great up and down
4-iron tee shot on long par 3, caught it heavy and landed in the front bunker
Bunker shot came out low and ran to 20 feet past the pin
Two-putt from 20 feet for a bogey, acceptable on a tough par 3
Another solid drive 275 yards, this one fading slightly but finding the fairway
7-iron from 160 yards, pure strike landing 15 feet from the pin
Burned the edge on the birdie putt, tapped in for par
3-wood off the tee 225 yards, straight but a little short of the fairway bunker
5-iron from 185 yards in the fairway, pushed it right into the greenside rough
Gap wedge chip from 25 yards in thick rough, came out hot to 18 feet
Missed the par putt, settled for bogey
Best drive of the day 285 yards right down the pipe
9-iron from 135 yards, landed softly on the green 12 feet from the pin
Drained the 12-footer for birdie, great way to end the front nine
Driver 270 yards, slight push into the right rough
6-iron from 170 yards in light rough, caught it clean and landed on the green
Two-putt from 22 feet for a solid par
3-wood 235 yards down the left side, caught the fairway bunker
8-iron from the fairway bunker, caught it heavy and came up 30 yards short
Pitching wedge chip to 10 feet
Made the 10-footer for a great bogey save from the bunker
6-iron tee shot on par 3, pushed right into the greenside bunker
Bunker shot to 15 feet
Missed the par save, two-putt for bogey
Driver 260 yards, hooked left into the trees
Punched 5-iron from the trees back to the fairway, 165 yards out
8-iron from 140 yards, landed on the green 25 feet from the pin
Three-putt from 25 feet for a double bogey, mental lapse
Back to solid driving, 275 yards in the fairway
7-iron from 165 yards, pure strike to 18 feet
Two-putt for par, solid hole
3-wood 240 yards, straight down the middle
4-iron from 200 yards, caught it thin and it ran through the green
Gap wedge chip from 30 yards, checked up to 6 feet
Made the 6-footer for par, great up and down
Driver 280 yards, slight fade but fairway found
9-iron from 130 yards, landed on the green 8 feet from the pin
Missed the birdie putt, tapped in for par
5-iron tee shot on par 3, pushed right into the greenside bunker
Bunker shot blasted out to 18 feet
Two-putt for bogey, acceptable on a tough hole
Absolutely piped driver 290 yards, best of the day
7-iron from 160 yards, landed on the green 20 feet from the pin
Two-putt for par to close out the round
